fulltext: Date: Jan 16, 2025 Bangalore TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN This certificate formally recognizes that Mr. Rahul P, who is currently pursuing final year BCA at The National College Jayanagar, has successfully completed an internship at Evap Solar Private Limited, serving as a Software Development Intern from September 15, 2025, to December 15, 2025. During this period, Mr. Srivatsa S consistently demonstrated a commendable attitude and a high level of professionalism. Mr. Rahul’s conduct and performance met the organization’s expectations, reflecting reliability and a strong work ethic. The management acknowledges the intern’s dedication and the positive impact made during the tenure. The organization expresses gratitude for the intern’s contributions and extends best wishes for continued success in both academic and professional endeavors. Sincerely, Dr. Altaf P CEO, EVAP SOLAR Mr. Rahul P
